title: Cuneiform Tablet #0599: Neo-Babylonian Census
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a census document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a census document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Census document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records census matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
